## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Webflow to discuss progress on integration pages and editorial content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integrations page is live with CMS access coming soon for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Editorial strategy shifting to more targeted SEO articles and in-depth developer guides](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [New focus on creating practical, Reddit-style articles showcasing Webflow capabilities (e.g., subscription services)](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Process refinements needed for research and content review workflows](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)

## Topics

### Integrations Page Launch

  - [Page is live at webflow.com/integrations with redirects from university pages](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [CMS populated with previous data; GrowthX to receive access for updates](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [API key access coming for programmatic management](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Template aesthetics to be addressed in future site-wide redesign](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Zach (dev rel team) reviewing integration pages; 5 ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Team asked to review 2-4 pages per week](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Some structural issues identified (e.g., Zapier capabilities, outdated info)](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [GrowthX to maintain queue of content for review](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Editorial Strategy Pivot

  - [Moving away from broad topics to more targeted SEO and developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [SEO articles to focus on definitions and basic descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Developer guides to provide practical, Reddit-style content (e.g., building subscription services with Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Potential topics: global e-commerce, usage-based billing, membership systems](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Research limitations causing issues with tool-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Need for better URL/domain filtering in research process](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Manual fixes applied to maintain progress while addressing systemic issues](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to set up integration account and confirm CMS access by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Prepare batch of SEO-focused articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Begin work on practical guide for building subscription service with Webflow and Stripe](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Colin to identify review team for listicle-style content](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine research process to improve accuracy and relevance of generated content](https://fathom.video/share/v-i7fwePNzm2pDSi3yuoVdqZVVmxsgMe?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
